entries.title: When you win, say nothing. When you lose, say less. - Paul Brown
entries.description: When you win, say nothing. When you lose, say less. - Paul Brown

entries.title: Life has meaning only if one barters it day by day for something other than itself. - Antoine de SaintExupery
entries.description: Life has meaning only if one barters it day by day for something other than itself. - Antoine de SaintExupery

entries.title: Love many things, for therein lies the true strength, and whosoever loves much performs much, and can accomplish much, and what is done in love is done well. - Vincent Van Gogh
entries.description: Love many things, for therein lies the true strength, and whosoever loves much performs much, and can accomplish much, and what is done in love is done well. - Vincent Van Gogh

entries.title: Leadership is a word and a concept that has been more argued than almost any other I know. I am not one of the desk-pounding types that likes to stick out his jaw and look like he is bossing the show. I would far rather get behind and, recognizing the frailties and the requirements of human nature,
entries.description: Leadership is a word and a concept that has been more argued than almost any other I know. I am not one of the desk-pounding types that likes to stick out his jaw and look like he is bossing the show. I would far rather get behind and, recognizing the frailties and the requirements of human nature, would rather try to persuade a man to go along, because once I have persuaded him, he will stick. If I scare him, he will stay just as long as he is scared, and then he is gone. - Dwight David Eisenhower

entries.title: The triple is the most exciting play in baseball. Home runs win a lot of games, but I never understood why fans are so obsessed with them. - Hank Aaron
entries.description: The triple is the most exciting play in baseball. Home runs win a lot of games, but I never understood why fans are so obsessed with them. - Hank Aaron

entries.title: I once asked a policeman how far it was to the subway. He said, I don't know, no one has ever made it. - Rodney Dangerfield
entries.description: I once asked a policeman how far it was to the subway. He said, I don't know, no one has ever made it. - Rodney Dangerfield

entries.title: You don't make art out of good intentions. - Gustave Flaubert
entries.description: You don't make art out of good intentions. - Gustave Flaubert

entries.title: A student never forgets an encouraging private word, when it is given with sincere respect and admiration. - William Lyon Phelps
entries.description: A student never forgets an encouraging private word, when it is given with sincere respect and admiration. - William Lyon Phelps
